verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Are you ready to take a Land? (Yes! Yes!) Are you ready to take a Land? (Yes! Yes!) Are you ready to take a Land? For the Lord? (x2)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Be Bold! Be Strong! For the Lord Our God is with us. (x2)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Do not be afraid, do not be dismayed, We're walking in faith and victory (x2) For the Lord Our God is with us.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Running to the camp tell everybody, Get ready! Get ready!
